titleStmt.title: SII 20.57: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 57. (B.K. No. 38 of 1938-39.) HADLI, RAMDURG TALUK, BELGAUM DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab standing in front of the village Chāvaḍi.

summary.p: This record is dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 9, Raktākshi, Chaitra, śu. 1, Monday, corresponding to A.D. 1084, March 10, the weekday being Sunday.

The inscription records a gift of land to god Gavaṟēśvaradēva by the sage Jñānaśakti-paṇḍita after purchasing it from the 420 Brāhmaṇas of the agrahāra Paldala. The record was composed by Karpparasa who was the son-in-law of Mahāsandhivigrahi, Daṇḍanāyaka Kāḷidāsa-Bhaṭṭa and the son of Chandra and Chāmāṁbike. The engraver was Kāvōja.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkya nagarā
© raṁbhamūḷastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . mahādēvāya namaḥ ©
© svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīpṛthvīvallabhamahārājādhirājaparamēśvaraparama
bhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara rā
jyamuttarābhivṛddhipravardhdhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire . śrīmaccā
ḷukyavikramavarṣada 9 neya raktākṣi saṁvatsarada caitra suddha 1 sōmavāradaṁdu svasti ya
maniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭhāṇajapasamādhiśīḷasaṁpannarappa A
nādisamsiddharggarubmapratiṣṭhitaramōghavarṣapratipāḷakardvijakuḷatiḷakarssaptasōmasaṁsthāva
bhṛtāvagāhanapavitrīkritaśarīrar ṣaṭkarmmanirataratithiAbhyāgatavisiṣṭajanapūjōtsā
harvvyavahāracaturmmukharssaraṇāgatavajrapaṁjararāśritajanakalpavṛkṣardvātriṁśatsa
hasrasamayārgghyahōmaśrībhairavarakṣātiyardduṣṭanigrahavisiṣṭapratipāḷakarappa
śrīmat paḻdalanālnūṟirppadimbar . śaraṇene kāvarīvararedartthige viprakuḷapradīparīśvara
caraṇābjabhṛngaradhikarssale dharmadamērugaḷdiśāntarayaśaruttamargguṇagaṇāgraṇigaḷsara
sījajātanoḷdoreyene lōkadoḷnegaḻda paḻdala sadvijarēṁ kṛtārttharō . vara vēdāgamaśāstrada pariṇa
tiyoḷajaṁge tāme dore padmabhavaṁ dore tamagepeṟaroḷāvano dore viprakuḷapradīpa roḷvasu
matiyoḷ . © yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭhāṇaparāyaṇarappa
1) Fourteen lines after this are chiselled out leaving no traces of the letters.

satavarṣaṁ tapadoḷu saṁtatamīśana pādapadmamaṁ pūjisidarkṣitivaḷeyaṁ pogaḷe guṇō
nnatarenisida dēvaśaktipaṇḍitamunipa . tatsiśyar . bhuvanadoḷnegaḻda paḻdalagavaṟēśvarada
lli śivane kāḷāmukhanāgavatarisidaninteṁbaṁtihali rnnyānaśaktipaṇḍitadēvar . haracara
ṇasarōruhamadhya tējaramaḷacāritrabhāsurayatihṛtpadmasarōvarahaṁsarnnyāna
śaktipaṇḍitadēvar . seragilladīvadānadoḷaraviṁdapriyatanūjanaṁ śucitanadoḷmarutātmaja
raṁ dēvaroḷdore paṇḍitapuṇḍarīkavanamārttaṇḍaṁ . v® . smaraparitāpamaṁ toṟidanakrama dī viṣa
yaṁgaḷellamaṁ harisivaneṁdu lōkamanituṁ neṟe kīrttipudintidēke vāktaruṇige sōltu mukti
vadhugāṭipaneṁdoḍe nyānaśaktidēvara caritaṁ carācaradoḷaṁ bagevāga vicitramelliyuṁ .
dānangaḷoḷage vidyādānamumāhāradānamuṁ mēleṁdī nyānaśaktibratīṁdraṁ tāneyde negaḻte
vaḍedanivaṟiṁda jagadoḷ . © śrīmadagrahāra paḻdalanālnūṟirppadiṁbara kaiyyoḷ nyānaśakti
paṇḍitar dravyapūrvvakadiṁ sarvvanamaśyamāge yūriṁgīśānyada śatrada keyyiṁ paḍuvaṇa pāḷa
keyyaṁ koṇḍu gavaṟēśvaradēvargge biṭṭa matta 5 Aydu . mattaṁ vidyādānakkaṁ posageṟeya ba
ṭṭeyiṁ baḍaga maṇiya vīsakaraydumattarvvasugeyaṁ Arddhanārīśvaradēvara keyyiṁ paḍuva
sarvvanamaśyamāgi koṇḍu biṭṭa matta 4 rnnālku . © mattamūriṁ mūḍa kadirmmiḍiya
baṭṭeya būhana tōṁṭadiṁ teṁka sarvvanamaśyamāge naḍeva hūvina tōṁṭaṁ matta 1 .
Intī dharmmama nālnūṟirppadiṁbaruṁ pratipāḷisuvar . Idanaḷidaṁ vāraṇāsiyo
ḷsāsirakavileyumaṁ kurukṣētradoḷsāsirvvarbrāhmaṇarumaṁ sōmēśvaradoḷe
kkōṭi tapōdhanarumanaḷida mahāpātakanakkuṁ . © sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasētuṁ nripāṇāṁ kālē kālē
pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ . sarvvānētān bhāginaḥ pārtthivēṁdrānbūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmabhadra .
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasundharā ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatēkrimiḥ .
śrīmanmahāsandhivigrahi daṇḍanāyakaṁ kāḷidāsabhaṭṭaraḷiyaṁ kavitāmanōharaṁ kavi diḷara karpara
saṁ bareda © v® © janakaṁ viprakuḷāṁbaradyumaṇicaṁdraṁ tāysadācāravarttini cāmāṁbike nirmmaḷō
rjjitayaśaṁ śrīkāḷidāsaṁ dharāvinutaṁ māvanumāvaraṁ sakaḷalōkārādhyavārādhya neṁdu nitāṁ
taṁ dhare baṇnikuṁ budhasamūhaṁ karppaṇaṁ karppanaṁ . vidyādharaṁ kāvōjana barepa . © .
Digital edition of SII 20.57 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
